exemplar.title: To what extent has the 2022 outbreak of Avian Influenza (H5N1) in the U.S.A. economically impacted the poultry industry, and how have biological factors influenced this effect?

detailedExemplarData.title: To what extent has the 2022 outbreak of Avian Influenza (H5N1) in the U.S.A. economically impacted the poultry industry, and how have biological factors influenced this effect?

strengths: The research topic is communicated clearly and sustained throughout the essay, with disciplined focus on economic and biological drivers of H5N1.
The research question is sharply formulated, uses appropriate IB command terms, and directly guides the investigation.
Methodology is justified with explicit discussion of primary and secondary data sources and credibility checks, showing informed selection across disciplines.
weaknesses: Minor digressions into human health contexts momentarily divert from the stated focus on the poultry industry.
An incomplete sentence in the methodology section interrupts coherence.
The justification of specific analytical tools (e.g., epidemiological models versus elasticity calculations) could be deepened by weighing alternatives.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Two strands comfortably reach the top band, and methodology justificationâwhile strongâis slightly less fully developed than an ideal. Overall clarity of focus, exceptional research question formulation, and largely informed methodological choices warrant the maximum 6 marks.

strengths: Source material is consistently relevant and displays disciplinary breadth, including peer-reviewed journals, government data sets, and high-quality theoretical works.
Knowledge is coherently integrated, applying economic and biological concepts directly to the US 2022 context.
Terminology and concepts are accurate, detailed, and used with depth (e.g., precise use of elasticity, virulence, PPC shifts).
weaknesses: A small number of lower-weight popular sources slightly dilute overall academic rigor.
Some descriptive passages (notably in biology) are not fully woven into the economic argument.
Primary economic data collection is limited; deeper original data could strengthen integration.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Despite minor issues with a few popular sources and uneven integration in places, the student demonstrates coherent disciplineâspecific knowledge, expertly chosen materials, and deep use of terminology, justifying full marks in this criterion.

strengths: The majority of research is well chosen, triangulated, and directly relevant to both economic and biological dimensions.
Analysis is coherent and largely supported by data (e.g., inelastic demand graphs, trade-flow evaluations).
Argument is logically structured, with clear interdisciplinary links (e.g., pathophysiology informing control-cost assessments).
weaknesses: Some conclusions rely on single-source estimates (e.g., cost figures) without deeper statistical validation.
Critical evaluation of alternative prevention strategies (such as US regulatory barriers) is present but lacks full nuance.
The economic and biological discussions occasionally run in parallel rather than forming a fully synthesised, seamless evaluation.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The investigation demonstrates high-quality research selection and coherent analysis, with a structured argument and some incisive insights. A slight shortfall in depth of statistical testing and nuanced evaluation of alternatives places it just below a perfect score, meriting 11 out of 12.

strengths: Academic conventions are met with a clear title page, table of contents, headings, and consistent pagination.
Visual elements are generally well chosen, numbered, and captioned, supporting the text.
Referencing is consistent in APA style, with a full bibliography and mostly correct in-text citations.
weaknesses: Several figures lack clear legends, scale bars, or axis labels, hindering precise interpretation.
The table of contents formatting is inconsistent (variable bolding, decorative symbols).
Heading levels are occasionally misused, and some figure captions are minimal, limiting narrative flow.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The presentation is strong overall, fully meeting academic structure, visual integration, and referencing criteria. Minor issues with figure labeling and formatting justify a slight one-point reduction to 3 marks.

weaknesses: No RPPF extracts or reflective commentary were included, preventing any demonstration of planning reflections, personal engagement, or intellectual initiative.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: In the absence of any reflection or RPPF documentation, no marks can be awarded in the Engagement criterion in accordance with IB requirements.

strandSelections.reasoning: The structure follows a clear economic/biological thread and attempts integration, yet occasionally the two disciplines operate in parallel rather than in a fully synthesised argument.  Critical evaluation (e.g., of vaccination cost versus benefit) is present but not nuanced across multiple viewpoints.  This corresponds to a well-structured argument with âsome critical insight,â the upper end of the 4-6 band.

In-text citations follow APA author-date style and correspond to a detailed reference list; formatting is largely consistent.  Occasional broken URLs or unconventional capitalisation are minor, so the work meets the highest presentation band.

The title, theme and disciplinary lenses are stated prominently on the cover page and the opening paragraph makes the subject focus (economic impact of H5N1 and biological drivers) immediately clear.  Throughout the essay the discussion returns explicitly to the U.S. poultry industry and to biological mechanisms, showing a sustained alignment with the announced focus.  Minor lapses (occasional digressions into human health) keep the work from the very top of the band, but overall clarity and appropriateness merit the upper-band award.

The report contains a title page, table of contents, section headings and sub-headings that create a logical flow.  Pagination and spacing are consistent.  The academic conventions are met with only minor over-long sub-section titles, so full marks within this band are justified.

The student demonstrates clear disciplinary knowledgeâexplaining the viral lytic cycle, price elasticity, and PPC shiftsâwhile applying it to the U.S. 2022 context.  Nevertheless, several sections remain descriptive (long virology explanations not firmly tied to economic evidence), and numerical claims (e.g., âmoderate impactâ) are not fully quantified.  Integration is present but uneven, placing the work comfortably in the 3-4 band.
No RPPF extracts or other reflective commentary are provided with the submission, so there is no evidence on which to award marks for reflection quality.

Analysis links biological transmissibility to economic shortages, employs supply-and-demand graphs, and evaluates trade data.  Conclusions are generally supported by cited figures and logical reasoning, and limitations are acknowledged in the conclusion.  Nonetheless, some claims (e.g., âminimal export impactâ) rely on single sources and lack deeper statistical testing, so the work meets but does not exceed the âcoherent with largely supported conclusionsâ descriptor.

The question is explicitly formulated, uses the IB command term âto what extent,â and sharply delimits time, place and disciplinary angles.  It is neither too broad nor ambiguous, and the two-part phrasing allows balanced treatment of economics and biology.  Because the EE later refers back to âmoderate extent,â the question demonstrably guides the investigation.  Very small opportunities for tighter quantification prevent a perfect score, but the formulation is clearly focused and purposeful.

The essay draws on a sizable corpus of current data (CDC maps, USDA price indices, peer-reviewed virology papers).  Most sources are well matched to each sub-section and are triangulated, showing deliberate selection.  A handful of journalistic citations of lesser calibre prevent a higher score, but the majority of research is unquestionably pertinent.
With no reflections, planning record or evidence of initiative beyond the essay itself, intellectual initiative cannot be assessed and must be awarded zero in accordance with the rubric.

The student identifies primary (CDC, USDA datasets) and secondary sources, explains credibility checks (Media Bias, PubMed) and justifies an interdisciplinary mix of theoretical and data-driven approaches.  However, the rationale for specific analytical tools (e.g., elasticity calculations or epidemiological modelling) is only briefly sketched, and no alternative methods are critically weighed.  Thus the methods are generally appropriate and partly informed, matching the 3-4 band rather than the fully âeffective and completeâ description of the top band.

The reference list shows a broad range of peer-reviewed papers, government statistics and reputable news outlets that are directly relevant to economics or biology of H5N1.  A few popular sources (Yahoo Finance, Healthline) of lower academic weight are also used, and there is limited primary economic data collection.  Hence selection is âmostly relevant and appropriateâ rather than âexpertly chosen,â justifying a solid mid-band mark.
Because the required RPPF is absent, the examiner cannot demonstrate any level of personal engagement.  Under IB rules this strand must therefore receive zero.

Numerous figures (graphs, maps, diagrams) are integrated, numbered and captioned.  Most are legible and sourced, though a few captions are minimal.  Placement supports the text, fulfilling the âwell-chosen and correctly labelledâ criterion.

Economic and biological terminology (inelastic demand, virulence, hemagglutinin, PPC) is used accurately and consistently, with correct symbols and units.  Concepts are explained rather than merely named, showing depth of understanding.  Minor citation formatting slips do not undermine the technical precision, warranting a high-band award.

annotations.comment: The title effectively communicates the interdisciplinary focus on economic and biological factors of the 2022 H5N1 outbreak. This clarity of topic identification shows strong alignment with the research question.
The student includes a word count under 4000 words, satisfying IB formatting requirements and demonstrating attention to submission guidelines.
Figure 1âs map lacks a clear scale bar or legend; adding these would improve interpretability and support reader understanding of geographic data.
The table of contents uses inconsistent bolding and symbols, making navigation less intuitive. Standardize formatting of section titles and remove decorative elements for clarity.
The opening paragraph situates the H5N1 outbreak in historical context and future food demand trends, demonstrating effective integration of background knowledge.
The sentence ending âThe biological factors looked atâ is incomplete. Complete the thought to maintain coherence and clearly introduce the upcoming factors.
Figure 2 is sourced correctly but would benefit from a brief legend explaining case density categories to enhance the readerâs interpretation of the map.
The initial summary response âmoderately impactedâ lacks reference to quantitative metrics. Cite specific economic figures here to ground the preliminary answer.
The methodology justification references data sources but omits discussion of alternative epidemiological methods. Critically weigh options to strengthen informed selection.
Evaluating source credibility via Media Bias/Fact Check and PubMed shows rigorous source selection. This underpins the reliability of subsequent analysis.
In the biology section, the description of viral structure provides depth but is not connected to economic implications. Link each concept back to the industry impact.
Figure 3âs adaptation credit is noted, but the student should specify what modifications were made to the original illustration.
The lytic cycle section offers a thorough mechanistic description, demonstrating robust biological knowledge relevant to H5N1.
The figure numbering is inconsistent: reference to âFigure 4â in text but the graphic is labeled as Figure 3. Align numbering for clarity.
The transmission section effectively explains wild bird flyways but would benefit from specific Râ values or case studies to quantify spread dynamics.
Excluding human cases is appropriately scoped, ensuring focus remains on economic impact, but briefly justifying exclusion strengthens methodological transparency.
The economic cost estimate US$2.5â3 billion is cited without explaining calculation methodology. Critically assess its basis and potential limitations.
Supplyâandâdemand diagrams are well drawn, but axes lack units and labels. Add axis titles (e.g., Price (US$/unit), Quantity (millions)) for precision.
The analysis of inelastic demand precisely links price elasticity to revenue changes, showing strong economic reasoning.
Figure 7 is studentâcreated but left unlabeled. Include axis labels and clarify curve definitions (e.g., Dâ, Dâ) to aid reader interpretation.
The quote âWhen money was tightâ¦â provides authentic industry insight, reinforcing the human impact of economic changes.
The heading styled as an h1 for a quote breaks the heading hierarchy. Use consistent heading levels to maintain structure.
Pathophysiology section offers a clear link between symptoms and control measures, demonstrating integration of biological detail and economic consequences.
Figures 9 and 10 footnotes interrupt the narrative flow. Consolidate captions directly under each image for visual coherence.
The trade restrictions map would benefit from a legend explaining color codes, making the extent of restrictions immediately clear.
Discussion of EU vaccine approval is insightful, yet evaluation of US regulatory barriers would deepen critical analysis of prevention strategies.
The PPC in Figure 13 visually conveys production cost impacts. However, axes lack labels and units; include these to ensure accurate interpretation.
The conclusion succinctly synthesizes economic and biological findings, effectively answering the research question and reflecting the investigationâs focus.
Figure 14âs scale lacks numeric thresholds or category definitions. Define each scale interval to make evaluation criteria transparent.
Reflective planning and personal engagement (RPPF) are absent, preventing assessment of student reflection and initiative. Include RPPF extracts in the appendix.
